rumor.detail: Agent Mike Makaab confirms no approach from Kaizer Chiefs or any club

newIntel.reasoning: New statement from agent directly contradicting earlier Kaizer Chiefs interest rumor from Jan 26, 2026. Date-gated (Feb 18 after Jan 26 latest). Clarifies status of reported interest.

rumor.detail: Soccer Laduma: No formal contact or offer from Pirates despite $200k reports

newIntel.reasoning: New intelligence contradicting Apr 4, 2026 Pirates rumor. Dated Apr 2 (before Apr 4), sources indicate no formal contact despite earlier reports of $200k offer preparation. Clarifies actual status of Pirates interest.
